Container.Name: hyperhdr
Container.ExtraSearchTerms: hyperhdr hdr ambient lighting bias lighting led hyperion
Container.Overview:
HyperHDR is an open source ambient lighting software with HDR tone mapping support. Captures video from a USB capture card and drives LED strips via USB or network controllers.
This image is automatically built and published within 24 hours of each upstream HyperHDR release, including beta versions. Use the "latest" tag for the newest stable release, or "beta" to always run the latest beta. You can also pin to any specific version tag.
The web interface will be available at: http://UNRAID_IP:8090

Config.Name: Flatbuffers Server Port
Config.Description: Flatbuffers server port for high-speed LED data input

Config.Name: Video Device
Config.Description: USB capture card device path. Remove if not using a capture card.
